query:
-- Check all services with $0 cost but non-zero revenue - likely missing costs
SELECT 
  c.name as customer,
  s.serviceId,
  s.planName,
  s.dataSource,
  s.monthlyCost,
  s.monthlyRevenue,
  s.serviceType,
  s.supplier
FROM services s
JOIN customers c ON s.customerExternalId = c.externalId
WHERE s.monthlyCost = 0 AND s.monthlyRevenue > 0
ORDER BY s.monthlyRevenue DESC
LIMIT 20;
